other_observers: I am the only observer on 04/29. On 05/02 it was observed by Joey Kellner, Norm Erthal and others. It was subsequently observed by several birders.; Yes
specific_location: 2 miles west of Last Chance on Hwy 36.
description: A gray-headed, dark-winged flycatcher with pink sides and a long, dark forked tail.Behaviors: Fly catching in the surrounding fields, occasionally perching on fence wires.Call: nonePlumage: adult
